name: BALL Corp
summary: Ball Corporation and its consolidated subsidiaries (collectively, Ball, the company, we or our) is one of the worlds leading suppliers of aluminum packaging for the beverage, personal care and household products industries. The company was organized in 1880 and incorporated in the state of Indiana, United States of America (U.S.), in 1922.
